channel.title: April 2026 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in April 2026 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Event Grid releases for April 2026
item.description:
Azure Event Grid namespaces are expanding MQTT capabilities to support more connected, scalable, standards-based real-time solutions. The release is intended to simplify backend integration and improve responsiveness for device experiences.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: dotnet: .NET and .NET Framework April 2026 servicing releases updates
item.description:
The post is a brief recap of April 2026 servicing updates for .NET and .NET Framework. It does not include specific version details or change items in the provided text.

  • Source: .NET
